playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: This is the third single and title track from Rick's second album. Released in February 1989, the song reached number 10 on the UK charts. It was written by Rick himself and produced by Phil Harding and Ian Curnow.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Hold Me In Your Arms (Official Video) [4K Remaster]

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: The second single from Rick Astley's album "Hold Me In Your Arms," titled "Take Me To Your Heart," reached the UK singles top 10 in November 1988. This track, written and produced by Stock Aitken and Waterman, also made it to the top 10 in several countries, including Spain, Denmark, Sweden, Greece, and Ireland.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Take Me to Your Heart (Official Video) (4K Remaster)

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: The follow-up to the megahit "Never Gonna Give You Up," titled "Whenever You Need Somebody," became a global top 10 hit. It reached number one in seven countries and entered the top three in the UK. Released at the end of October 1987, the song was the title track of his debut album, which was produced by Stock Aitken Waterman. The album has sold an impressive 15.2 million copies worldwide.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Whenever You Need Somebody (Official Video) (4K Remaster)

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: "Cry For Help" was the first single from Rick Astley's third album, "Free." It reached number 7 on both the UK and US charts, making Rick the first male solo artist to have his first eight singles enter the top 10 in Britain. The ballad was co-written by Rick and Rob Fisher, who is best known as one half of the duo Climie Fisher.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Cry for Help (Official Video) (4K Remaster)

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: "Never Gonna Give You Up" was a global hit upon its release in July 1987, reaching the top of the charts in 25 countries, including Rick Astley's home country, the UK, and the US Billboard Hot 100. The song also won the Brit Award for Best Single in 1988. It was written and produced by the trio Stock Aitken and Waterman and served as the lead single from Rick's debut album, "Whenever You Need Somebody." The album itself reached number one in the UK and went on to sell over 15 million copies worldwide.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up (Official Video) (4K Remaster)

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: The official music video for "Together Forever" by Rick Astley.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Together Forever (Official Video) [4K Remaster]

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: “Giving Up On Love” was a single from Rick Astley's second album, Hold Me In Your Arms, released exclusively in North America just before his 1989 US tour in April.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Giving Up On Love (Official Video) [4K Remaster]

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: The official video for "She Wants to Dance With Me," performed by Rick Astley, showcases the lead single from his second album. Released in September 1988, the song became a Top 10 hit worldwide, reaching number one in Canada. Notably, this track marks Rick's first self-written single.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - She Wants To Dance With Me (Official Video) (4K Remaster)

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: "When I Fall in Love" Official Video, remastered in 2022, taken from the album "Whenever You Need Somebody."
playlist.title: Rick Astley - When I Fall In Love (Official Video, HD Remaster)

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: Official music video for "Hopelessly" by Rick Astley. The second single from Astley's "Body and Soul" LP, "Hopelessly," was released in November 1993 and reached number 8 in Canada and number 28 on the US Billboard Hot 100.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Hopelessly (Official Music Video)

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: The official video for "Dance" is from Rick's album titled '50'.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Dance (Official Video) [4K Remaster]

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: Official music video for "Move Right Out" (UK Version) by Rick Astley. This track is from the album "Free," released in 1991 and remastered on August 30, 2024, for LP and Deluxe editions.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Move Right Out (Official Video) [4K Remaster]

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: Music video by Rick Astley performing "Keep Singing." Rick Astley is under an exclusive license to BMG Rights Management.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Keep Singing (Official Video) [4K Remaster]

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: The official theme song for the original podcast, Unwanted. Video created by Bruna Pias for 50/50 Media House.
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Unwanted (Official Song from the Podcast) (Lyric Video) [Remastered in 4K]

playlist.author: Rick Astley
playlist.description: Music video by Rick Astley for "Angels On My Side," from the album "50."
playlist.title: Rick Astley - Angels On My Side (Official Video) [4K Remaster]
